help.title: User Guide
help.subtitle: Everything you need to make the most of Baity

tooltips.phoneFormat: Saudi phone starting with 05 — used later for sign-in
tooltips.memberRole: OWNER (one only) · ADMIN (parent) · MEMBER (adult) · CHILD (with PIN)
tooltips.childAge: Between 4-17 — used to filter age-appropriate jobs
tooltips.childPin: 4 digits — for quick login without OTP. Reset any time from member management
tooltips.billRecurring: Bill auto-generates each cycle (month/quarter/...) once payment is recorded
tooltips.choreAssignment: WHO_LEAST_DID auto-assigns to person with fewest completions (fair) · DYNAMIC_REGULAR reschedules X days after last actual completion
tooltips.chorePeriod: DAILY = every X days from creation · DYNAMIC = X days after last completion — important for chores that get delayed
tooltips.applianceWarranty: Auto-alerts before expiry by configured days (default 30)
tooltips.applianceStore: Pick from list or type any other store name — saved as free text
tooltips.archiveExpiry: For documents that expire (insurance, license) — you'll be notified beforehand
tooltips.archiveTags: Search keywords (comma-separated) — like: lease, rent, apartment
tooltips.savingsGoal: Goal child saves toward — they see motivating progress bar each time they earn
tooltips.telegramLink: One-time link — all family members get notifications on the same bot
tooltips.pushNotifications: Notifications shown even when site is closed — supplements Telegram

gettingStarted.title: Quick Start
gettingStarted.intro: First time opening Baity? Here are the essential steps to begin.

steps.0: Link your account to Telegram from the bot to receive verification codes and notifications.
steps.1: Sign in with your phone, then enter the verification code received on Telegram.
steps.2: Create your household (name + your name). You become OWNER with full permissions.
steps.3: Add family members from Settings → Members before adding any data.

gettingStarted.tip: Add members first — their names appear in other features (chores, household economy, etc.).

members.title: Household Members
members.intro: Manage parents and children — each with their own role and permissions.

steps.0: Go to Settings → Members → click 'Add member'.
steps.1: Fill in name + phone + select role (parent, member, child).
steps.2: For children (4-17): enter age + 4-digit PIN. Wallet auto-created.

members.tip: Child PIN can be changed anytime via 🔑 button next to their name. Children can't register themselves — owner adds them.

bills.title: Bills
bills.intro: Track monthly and recurring bills — with reminders before due dates.

steps.0: Go to Bills → click '+ Add bill'.
steps.1: Enter title + category + amount + due date.
steps.2: Enable 'Recurring bill' to auto-generate next bill on payment.
steps.3: When paid, click 'Record payment' to update status and generate next bill.

bills.tip: Pick provider from list (STC, SEC, etc.) — app uses official logo automatically.

chores.title: Recurring Chores
chores.intro: Organize household chores fairly — with 6 period types and 4 smart assignment strategies.

steps.2: Pick assignment: least-did-it (fair), random, alphabetic, or fixed.
steps.3: Set point reward (for kids) — auto-added to executor's wallet.
steps.4: Click 'Done' on completion — next due date auto-calculated.

chores.tip: Use 'dynamic' for chores not tied to a fixed date (like washing the car every 10 days from last wash).

shopping.title: Shopping Lists
shopping.intro: Lists shared between family members — with realtime sync across devices.

steps.0: Go to Shopping → create a new list (like 'Weekly Groceries').
steps.1: Add items with quantity, estimated price, and urgency.
steps.2: Mark item as bought — change appears on family devices instantly.

shopping.tip: Shared lists show to all members in real time — useful when mom's at the supermarket and needs the latest update.

appliances.title: Appliances & Warranties
appliances.intro: Register your home appliances with purchase invoices and warranty dates — with auto-alerts.

steps.0: Go to Appliances → click '+ Add appliance'.
steps.1: Enter name, brand, model + store (from Saudi store list).
steps.2: Enter warranty start/end + alert days before expiry.
steps.3: Upload purchase invoice and warranty card from 'Documents' section inside appliance.

appliances.tip: Set 'alert days = 30' to be notified one month before warranty ends — enough time to renew.

archive.title: Archive
archive.intro: Save important documents (contracts, insurance, medical, government) — with expiry alerts.

steps.0: Go to Archive → click '+ Upload document'.
steps.1: Pick category + clear title + (optional) expiry date + search tags.
steps.2: Upload file (image or PDF up to 20MB).

archive.tip: Search works on title, description, and tags — use smart tags like: 'lease', '2026', 'apartment-riyadh'.

houseEconomy.title: Household Economy (Children)
houseEconomy.intro: Teach kids economics with job menu + rewards + personal wallet for each child.

steps.0: Go to Wallet → 'Job menu' → add a job with set reward.
steps.1: Child opens '/child/menu' from their device, picks a job, clicks 'Start'.
steps.2: On completion, child clicks 'Finish' and uploads before/after photo (optional).
steps.3: You receive notification to review and approve → reward added to wallet.
steps.4: Set savings goal for child (toy, bike) so they see progress over time.

houseEconomy.tip: Easy jobs (5-10 SAR) work better for younger kids. Older kids need higher rewards for harder tasks.

familyBank.title: Family Bank
familyBank.intro: Shows total kids' savings with monthly educational interest auto-added on day 1 of each month.

steps.0: Go to Family Bank to see: total balance + each child's savings + transaction log.
steps.1: Interest is auto-calculated: monthly percent on savings balance (default 2%).
steps.2: Teach kids about interest — the more they save, the more it grows without extra work.

familyBank.tip: Tell your child: if you save 100 SAR, next month it becomes 102 SAR without working! That's the power of early saving.

pin.title: Child PIN
pin.intro: Short numeric PIN for kids — alternative to complex OTP. Parent sets and changes it.

steps.0: In Settings → Members, click 🔑 next to child's name.
steps.1: Enter 4-digit PIN — encrypted with bcrypt before saving.

pin.tip: Don't use obvious PINs like 1234 or birth year. Pick something the child remembers but hard to guess.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.intro: Auto Telegram alerts for bills, chores, appliances, and expiring documents.

steps.1: You'll get: bills before due (7/3/1 days) + overdue chores + expiring warranties + archive documents.
steps.2: Optional: enable 'Browser notifications' to complement Telegram.

notifications.tip: Telegram alerts are enough for most. Browser alerts help heavy users who want instant alerts on the site.

telegram.title: Linking Telegram
telegram.intro: Telegram bot for verification codes and all notifications — one-time, free, secure.

steps.0: Open Baity bot from Settings → Link Telegram.
steps.1: Click 'Start' in the bot then share your phone number (button appears automatically).
steps.2: Bot replies 'Linked ✓' — all alerts come through it.

telegram.tip: Bot doesn't store your data — only uses chat_id to send messages. Completely safe.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.intro: Your data is fully isolated from any other family — verified automatically.

steps.0: Every API filters by householdId (no way to see another household's data).
steps.1: Bills and document images on Supabase Storage with household-scoped path + signed URLs (1 hour).
steps.2: Auto EXIF strip on every image (removes GPS and device data).
steps.3: Child PINs encrypted with bcrypt rounds=12 — unreadable even from the database.

privacy.tip: If you suspect any leak, run 'verify-isolation.mjs' which automatically checks isolation across 10 layers.
